captions.formal: Cars and buses move along a multi-lane city street lined with yellow autumn trees, with tall residential buildings visible in the background.
captions.sarcastic: Another groundbreaking video of cars driving. The trees changing color really raises the stakes here.
captions.humorous_tech: This traffic stream has better throughput than my home Wi-Fi. Zero packet loss, infinite buffer overflow.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Rush hour looks like everyone suddenly remembered they left the stove on and all agreed to go check at the exact same time.

captions.formal: A small orange kitten sits among leafy bushes, then walks slowly toward the camera on a dirt path.
captions.sarcastic: Breaking news: a kitten walked forward. Nature documentaries will never be the same.
captions.humorous_tech: Boot sequence complete. Kitten OS initiating direct eye contact protocol, no firewall detected.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This kitten is walking toward the camera like it knows it already owns the place, and honestly, it does.

captions.formal: A young woman with an afro hairstyle sits at a white desk in a modern office, typing on a desktop computer keyboard with focused concentration.
captions.sarcastic: groundbreaking footage of someone doing exactly what computers are for.
captions.humorous_tech: Her WPM is overclocked but the CPU cooler is just office AC. No kernel panic detected yet.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She types like she is arguing with someone who wronged her three years ago.

captions.formal: A small black creature sits motionless at the base of a large tree in a sunlit grassy clearing surrounded by dense forest.
captions.sarcastic: Eight frames of groundbreaking footage showing a tree that slightly changes its mind about lighting.
captions.humorous_tech: Tree.render() executed successfully. Creature.exe remains idle, no user input detected across 8 frames.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This little black blob has achieved my weekend goals: finding a nice spot under a tree and doing absolutely nothing.

captions.formal: A red-haired traveler in winter clothing traverses a snowy landscape, then engages in close combat with a hooded spearman among jagged rocks.
captions.sarcastic: Oh great, another scenic winter walk that ends in being shoved around by a guy with a stick. Travel brochures never mention this part.
captions.humorous_tech: Melee combat.exe crashed. User tried to parry with bare hands, received critical error and unexpected shutdown.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She brought a bad attitude to a stick fight. The stick won.

captions.formal: A camera moves along a palm-lined beach promenade where pedestrians walk on a pink sidewalk beside a green bike lane under a bright blue sky.
captions.sarcastic: groundbreaking footage of people walking outside. Cannes really missed this one.
captions.humorous_tech: POV: you're a self-driving bike lane running a smooth 60fps render with zero pedestrian collision bugs.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Hundreds of people paying Florida prices to do the exact same walking they do at home for free.

captions.formal: Vehicles travel along a multi-lane city road lined with autumn trees, with high-rise residential buildings visible in the background.
captions.sarcastic: A stunning breakthrough in urban innovation, cars driving on a road. Hold the press.
captions.humorous_tech: Traffic.exe is running smoothly, no fatal errors yet, though the packet loss of that red sedan is suspicious.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Every single one of these drivers is absolutely sure they are the main character in this city.

captions.formal: A small orange kitten walks slowly toward the camera through a shaded path between leafy bushes and trees.
captions.sarcastic: Breaking news: a kitten walks forward. Nature documentaries will never recover from this footage.
captions.humorous_tech: Kitten.exe has initiated approach protocol. Tail status: upright. Cuteness buffer: overflowing.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This kitten is walking toward you with the confidence of someone who has never once paid a bill.

captions.formal: A woman sits at a desk in a modern office, typing on a keyboard while looking at a large computer monitor.
captions.sarcastic: Thrilling footage of someone doing exactly what the chair was designed for.
captions.humorous_tech: Keyboard input detected. Human.exe running at 100% CPU with zero syntax errors so far.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She types with the focus of someone who definitely remembered to save their work. Hopefully.

captions.formal: A stylized animated scene shows a large tree with exposed roots growing atop a mossy mound with a dark burrow entrance, surrounded by dense forest.
captions.sarcastic: Wow, a tree with a hole. Nature's studio apartment. Truly groundbreaking cinema.
captions.humorous_tech: Tree.exe has been running for 4.5 billion years. Uptime is solid but the root directory is getting cluttered.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This tree is basically me trying to hold my ground while life swirls around in a blur.

captions.formal: A red-haired figure traverses a snowy, alien landscape and confronts an armed pursuer among jagged rock formations.
captions.sarcastic: Oh great, another scenic winter hike that ends in a stick fight. Travel blogs never mention this part.
captions.humorous_tech: NPC pathfinding failed. The local wildlife spawned with melee weapons and aggressive AI in this snow biome.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She went out for a quiet walk in the snow and suddenly everyone wants to play whack-a-mole with sticks.

captions.formal: Pedestrians walk along a palm-lined promenade beside a green bike lane on a sunny coastal street.
captions.sarcastic: Wow, people walking near palm trees. Truly groundbreaking content for the ages.
captions.humorous_tech: POV: your GPS rerouted you to 'render_beach_walk.exe' and now you're stuck in an infinite loop of tourists.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Everyone here looks like they're either late for a nap or already had three margaritas for breakfast.
